summary: Update mode testing complete. All tests pass: 63 backend tests and 51 frontend E2E tests. Fixed 3 stale specs in combat-flows.spec.ts. Created new tests for Reference tab features (Items Database, Rules Reference), login page logos, and Party tab initiative modifier display.
seed_data_creation: Test data created dynamically with TEST_ prefix during test runs, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Reference tab has 14 new E2E tests covering Items Database (search, filters) and Rules Reference (DC tables, XP thresholds, conditions, cover rules). Login page logos verified (2 Rookie Quest logos + TTRPG Companion logo). Party tab initiative modifier correctly shows + or - format (not +-). Combat-flows.spec.ts updated to match current UI.

features_tested.login_page_logos: PASS - Rookie Quest logo on both left (above form) and right sides, TTRPG Companion logo on right
features_tested.reference_tab_items_database: PASS - 3076 items displayed, search functionality, type filter, rarity filter
features_tested.reference_tab_rules_reference: PASS - DC tables (DC 5-30), XP thresholds (levels 1-20), conditions (15 conditions), cover rules
features_tested.party_tab_initiative_modifier: PASS - Shows +1 correctly (not +-1), stats display correct modifiers
features_tested.places_of_interest: PASS - Existing tests verify add/view/edit/delete places in locations
features_tested.dm_screen_combat_flow: PASS - Encounter selection, start combat, end combat, quick start with players

verified_bug_fixes.initiative_modifier: FIXED - Now shows '+X' for positive modifiers and '-X' for negative modifiers correctly
